notes: Directory is named game-18-stacks and the game is branded 'STACKS' (a 3D library metaphor), but the underlying mechanic genuinely teaches 'inverted index and ranking', not a thematic reskin: src/sim/index.ts is a correct pure-TS inverted index (term->posting list, tf, idf=log(N/df), additive tf*idf scoring, deterministic ranking with docId tie-break), proven by 13 Vitest cases. L1 files word-cards onto term shelves (= tokenization + building the inverted index), L2 predicts the top doc for a one-term query (= TF-IDF ranking). L3 two-term additive scoring and L4 full top-3 are covered by Vitest though not driven in the headed smoke. Evidence schema is correct and asserted in a green smoke; reviewSlice is the real substrate-generated file (nextReviews empty => deepening play for U18, as the PLAN notes U18 is not yet substrate-gated). Observations (non-blocking): (a) the prior capture at .loops/.../evidence.json is STALE and uses a different schema (source='postinglattice', unit_id='18_search_engine' without U18- prefix, encounter_id instead of scenario_id) — the live emit.ts is the source of truth and is correct; (b) build emits a >500KB chunk warning (three.js bundled) — cosmetic, not a gate failure.
